reviews.text: Can’t recommend Trig and Char enough, they were spectacular. They are so friendly and fun and made my husband and I completely comfortable with the wedding photo process. My wedding was the third time I have used Trystan photograph and I will continue to use them in the future. They know how to capture the best candid moments and  the posed family photos and even though the weather during our wedding ceremony provided a bit of a challenge, our photos turned out spectacular.

We used Trystan Photography for our wedding last weekend, and I even though I haven't seen the photos yet, I want to give Char and Jamie 5 stars - they were so nice to work with; professional and skilled while also being happy, genuine, and fun. Char directed photos very efficiently and made sure everyone felt comfortable and everything went extremely smoothly. I can't wait to see the photos, but I'm sure they will be beautiful (like the engagement photos they did for us in the winter). Thanks Trystan Photography!

Trystan Photography was an excellent choice for our destination wedding in Breckenridge, Colorado! Not only were both Trig and Char so friendly and fun, but they new exactly what they were doing! I was relieved that they took charge and guided us around Breckenridge for the perfect shots, since we were from out of state and clueless as to where to go other than "on top of the mountain" and "on Main Street". They put up with our large wedding party of 24 and listened to all of my shot requests (I'm kind of a detail freak). Trig made sure I got everything that I wanted and asked for even after I received all of my photos back. They were very patient and the best couple to work with! Our photos turned out AMAZING and everyone cannot get over how much they almost look fake because they were so beautiful. Trystan Photography definitely knows how to capture the best, natural moments so we didn't end up with tons of posed photos that we would never do anything with. We couldn't have asked for better photographers to work with. Thank you so much Trig and Char for capturing our special day!  :-)

Our daughter wanted her Senior pictures done at Garden of the Gods. Though we moved to Utah several years ago, Colorado is "home" for her. We knew of Trystan Photography's work and knew they were who we wanted to go with. Charlotte does the MOST amazing work I have ever seen! Choosing which pics we want is nearly impossible because they are all so good. (yes, we DID end up buying them all!) It was obvious during the shoot that Char truly has an eye for her subject, the lighting, backgrounds, movement, all of the elements that make photos really special. One day when our "baby" gets married I can guarantee that Trystan Photography will be our first and only call. Heck, we will fly them out if necessary--they are just that good. I cannot recommend them highly enough. They are the BEST. EVER. Thanks for making her Senior photos so incredibly special.

Trystan Photography exceeded my wildest expectations – our wedding photos are beyond amazing! Viewing the photos allowed us to relive the whole day; they truly captured the spirit of our ceremony and reception. Trig was so easy to work with, he made my husband and I feel incredibly comfortable during our shoot and the end results are magazine-worthy. Trystan Photography provided us with both artistic and dramatic shoots, as well as fun and formal portraits. They can truly do everything! Definitely five stars!
